title: ENT Permission Logic

posts.author: lauemotta (Laura Motta )
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello everyone, I’m noticing a limitation in the ENT permission logic regarding item visibility.
We need the ability to differentiate visibility by role: specifically, allowing Editors full visibility of the board while restricting Assigned Contributors to only their assigned items. Currently, because board permissions impact everyone but the Owner, we cannot achieve this granular setup without compromising the Editor’s workflow.

What are you trying to achieve

Allowe Editors full visibility of the board while restricting Assigned Contributors to only their assigned items.
